2604.08597.title: STIndex: A Context-Aware Multi-Dimensional Spatiotemporal Information Extraction System
2604.08597.paper_summary: Extracting structured knowledge from unstructured data still faces practical limitations: entity and event extraction pipelines remain brittle, knowledge graph construction requires costly ontology engineering, and cross-domain generalization is rarely production-ready. In contrast, space and time provide universal contextual anchors that naturally align heterogeneous information and benefit downstream tasks such as retrieval and reasoning. We introduce \textbf{STIndex}, an end-to-end system that structures unstructured content into a multidimensional spatiotemporal data warehouse. Users define domain-specific analysis dimensions with configurable hierarchies, while large language models perform context-aware extraction and grounding. \textbf{STIndex} integrates document-level memory, geocoding correction, and quality validation, and offers an interactive analytics dashboard for visualization, clustering, burst detection, and entity network analysis. In evaluation on a public health benchmark, \textbf{STIndex} improves spatiotemporal entity extraction F1 by 4.37\% (GPT-4o-mini) and 3.60\% (Qwen3-8B). A live demonstration and open-source code are available at https://stindex.ai4wa.com/dashboard.
2604.08597.paper_summary_zh: 從非結構化數據中提取結構化知識仍然面臨實際限制：實體和事件提取管道仍然脆弱，知識圖譜構建需要昂貴的本體工程，而跨領域泛化則很少能達到生產就緒的狀態。相對而言，空間和時間提供了普遍的上下文錨點，自然地對齊異質信息，並有利於下游任務，如檢索和推理。我們介紹 \textbf{STIndex}，一個將非結構化內容結構化為多維時空數據倉庫的端到端系統。用戶可以定義具有可配置層級的特定領域分析維度，而大型語言模型則執行上下文感知的提取和基礎。 \textbf{STIndex} 集成了文檔級記憶、地理編碼修正和質量驗證，並提供了一個互動分析儀表板，用於可視化、聚類、突發檢測和實體網絡分析。在公共衛生基準的評估中，\textbf{STIndex} 對時空實體提取的 F1 提升了 4.37\%（GPT-4o-mini）和 3.60\%（Qwen3-8B）。現場演示和開源代碼可在 https://stindex.ai4wa.com/dashboard 獲得。
2604.08597.author: Wenxiao Zhang et.al.
2604.08597.authors: Wenxiao Zhang, Yu Liu, Qiang sun, Yihao Ding, Sirui Li, Yanbing Liu, Jin B. Hong, Wei Liu
